_meta: Scanner directive: do not include this object in prompt composition (no `output` field).

input.scope: Access Control (AC) family for a 250-employee SaaS company at IL2 readiness target.

output.summary: Organization has baseline IAM with SSO and unique IDs but lacks formalized access reviews, automated provisioning evidence, and session lock enforcement on shared workstations.

gaps.description: Inactive accounts are not disabled within 35 days; 12 accounts identified with last login > 90 days.
Use of privileged accounts is logged but not reviewed on a defined cadence.
Session lock GPO not applied to contractor laptops.

recommended_roadmap: Q1: Implement HRIS-driven deprovisioning integration to satisfy AC-2(3).
Q1: Stand up monthly privileged account usage review with sign-off.
Q2: Extend session lock GPO scope to all managed endpoints.

input.scope: Annex A.5 Organizational controls for a Series A fintech.

output.summary: Information security policies exist but are not reviewed annually; supplier security clauses are absent from 4 of 7 vendor contracts in scope.

gaps.description: Information security policy last reviewed 19 months ago; missing executive approval signature.
Supplier agreements lack security and confidentiality clauses for 4 critical SaaS vendors.

recommended_roadmap: Month 1: Refresh and re-approve information security policy.
Months 2-3: Renegotiate or amend the 4 missing supplier agreements.
